test-code.description: ok, implements Cloneable
bad, doesn't implement Cloneable
ok, not Object.clone since method has a param
ok, doesn't implement Cloneable but only throw CloneNotSupportedException
ok, inner class implements Cloneable
ok, implements interface in same package which extends Cloneable
ok, implements interface imported implicitly which extends Cloneable
ok, implements interface which extends Cloneable
ok, extends superclass AND implements cloneable
#6693 ok, doesn't implement Cloneable but only throws CloneNotSupportedException via a local variable
#6693 ok, doesn't implement Cloneable but only throws CloneNotSupportedException, preceded by a statement that isn't a throw
#6693 ok, doesn't implement Cloneable but throw of CloneNotSupportedException is inside a try/catch
#6693 bad, no throw statement at all is not exempted (empty/no-op body)
#6693 bad, not all throws are CloneNotSupportedException
#6693 bad, a return statement anywhere in the body disqualifies the exemption
#6693 ok, a return statement inside a nested lambda doesn't count against the enclosing method
#6693 ok, multiple throw statements in different branches, all of them CloneNotSupportedException
Bug 681, extending a class which implements Cloneable.
Bug 1765613, NullPointerException on enum
#1534 [java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable: ClassCastException with Annotation (java8)
#1532 [java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable: Implemented Interface extends Cloneable - part 1: interface
#1532 [java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable: Implemented Interface extends Cloneable - part 2: interface
#1532 [java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable: Implemented Interface extends Cloneable
[java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable triggers for interfaces #1005
[java] CloneMethodMustImplementCloneable: False negative with local classes #3343
